input.resume_text:
Priya Raman
Houston, Texas, United States

SUMMARY
Former math teacher moving into data work. Two years of professional analytics experience after completing an internal apprenticeship: SQL reporting, Python notebooks, Tableau dashboards, data cleaning, stakeholder interviews, and A/B test readouts.

PROJECT NOTES
- Built weekly student-success metrics in SQL and Python.
- Created Tableau dashboards for district operations.
- Wants remote data analyst, analytics engineer, or junior data engineer roles.
- Minimum acceptable base compensation is 85000 USD.
- Not looking for teaching, sales, or customer support roles.
